latest.title: Dead desert trees reveal a root trick most miss
latest.script_key: this tree s still alive look close at the bark those cracks don t just dry it out they re air vents because under this sand its roots run sideways until they hit water that s why it survives months with no rain i didn t know trees did this until i saw their roots stretch like this

latest.title: Forests can cool the air below them
